recommendations.title: Race
recommendations.overview: The plot thickens around two horse-racing competitors when three beautiful women come into their lives and a murder is committed.
recommendations.director: Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla, Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla

recommendations.title: Race 2
recommendations.overview: Ranvir Singh encounters the Indian mafia in Turkey as he carries out a mission to avenge his lover's death.
recommendations.director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla, Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla

recommendations.title: Baazigar
recommendations.overview: A young man with a vendetta against a business tycoon seduces and kills his eldest daughter and then proceeds to his younger daughter but she begins to suspect her new lover's ulterior motive.
recommendations.director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla, Mustan Alibhai Burmawalla

recommendations.title: Nayak: The Real Hero
recommendations.overview: Shivajirao, a TV reporter, gets a chance to be the Chief Minister of Maharashtra for a day after being challenged by incumbent Chief Minister Balraj Chauhan. After his one-day stint turns out to be a huge success, his life spirals out of control and

recommendations.title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
recommendations.overview: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

recommendations.title: SPY x FAMILY CODE: White
recommendations.overview: While under the guise of taking his family on a weekend winter getaway, Loid's attempt to make progress on his current mission Operation Strix proves difficult when Anya mistakenly gets involved and triggers events that threaten world peace.

recommendations.title: Navalny
recommendations.overview: Follows the man who survived an assassination attempt by poisoning with a lethal nerve agent in August 2020. During his months-long recovery, he makes shocking discoveries about the attempt on his life and decides to return home.

recommendations.title: Esterno Notte (part I)
recommendations.overview: The 1978 kidnapping and assassination of former Italian Prime Minister Aldo Moro by Red Brigades terrorists.

recommendations.title: Boris: The Film
recommendations.overview: A director and his crew attempt to make the transition from the small to the big screen.
recommendations.director: Luca Vendruscolo, Giacomo Ciarrapico, Mattia Torre

recommendations.title: Heads of State
